name: unwatchState
title: Unwatch State
description: Stop watching state paths. Provide a watchId to remove a single watch, or a path to remove all watches whose path starts with the given prefix. At least one of watchId or path must be provided.

watchId.description: Watch ID returned by watchState — removes that single watch

path.description: CVM path prefix vector — removes all watches whose path starts with this prefix, e.g. '[:accounts #56785]' removes all watches under that account
